caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap adorned with various patches and a matching green t-shirt with bold text. The setting appears to be a well-decorated room, possibly a studio, with framed photographs and memorabilia adorning the walls. A mannequin dressed in casual attire stands in the background, along with shelves displaying clothing items. Another person, partially visible behind the main subject, seems to be assisting or observing. The man speaks into the microphone, gesturing slightly as he engages in conversation, suggesting an interactive and dynamic discussion.
